meaning: <意>n.萨姆布卡酒,意大利茴香酒
examples: She cites Sambuca, a restaurant on the Upper West Side, and Risotteria, in the West Village, as among her favorites.
But it indicated that the Tory deputy chairman had, in fact, arranged to dine with Terence Baker on Tuesday the 9th at Sambuca restaurant in Chelsea.
